## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (Biome linting passes)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### Components (if applicable)

- [ ] Component has TypeScript types defined
- [ ] Component uses `forwardRef` where appropriate
- [ ] Component has CVA variants (if applicable)
- [ ] Component has proper ARIA attributes for accessibility
- [ ] Component has `data-slot` attribute
- [ ] Component supports dark mode
- [ ] Component has Storybook story
- [ ] Component has documentation (README.md)
- [ ] Component has test coverage

### Accessibility

- [ ] I have tested keyboard navigation
- [ ] I have verified screen reader compatibility
- [ ] I have checked color contrast ratios
- [ ] I have added appropriate ARIA labels/descriptions
- [ ] I have tested with reduced motion preferences

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if needed)
- [ ] I have updated component documentation
- [ ] I have added/updated Storybook stories
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Code examples are clear and functional

### Performance

- [ ] I have checked bundle size impact
- [ ] I have optimized images/assets (if applicable)
- [ ] I have avoided unnecessary re-renders
- [ ] I have tested on slower devices/connections
